query:
_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes _sourcecategory="source_volume" 
| parse regex "\"(?<source>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi 
| bytes/1024/1024 as mb 
| timeslice 15m| sum(mb) as mb by source ,_timeslice
| if (source matches "*_volume","views",source) as source
| total mb as tmb by _timeslice
| if (mb/tmb <.01,"others",source) as source 
| sum(mb) as mbby source,_timeslice | transpose row _timeslice column source

sources.panelTitle: Collection Over Time by source > 1% ingest
